evidence: Love this. Not the sexiest thing in the world but saving someone in your org multiple weeks of manual work is an awesome efficiency win.
I bought Laplink to move all my programs and files from the desktop to a new laptop as a way to have a ready to use backup. I used the special 'ethernet' cable and the transfer went very smoothly.
Human consumers want to see agreed upon metrics that is accurate and is directly correlated with health of biz.
Second thing is accuracy once you have decided metric you dont want non-deterministic agent in loop you want repeatable process which you can rely upon.
I used Laplink again to move those and had good help from Laplink Customer Service in making it happen.
I haven't opened all of the devices (I haven't earned enough), but I wish it had a little history with it to round it out.
You can create lots of reports, but no way to see how your budget is faring on the income end and if you have irregular income, it's not very useful at all.
While reports seem to be correct when I create them, the display of the rents paid year-to-date when using the 'Rent Center' always shows 0 for all properties.
This is not organized well, difficult to use and doesn't do what I want it to.
What makes this excellent is that it has 3 different levels. Easy is easy, and so forth.
I have kept the laptop current and updated since and lived with peace of mind.
I bought Laplink to move all my programs and files from the desktop to a new laptop as a way to have a ready to use backup.
I used the special 'ethernet' cable and the transfer went very smoothly.
I used Laplink again to move those and had good help from Laplink Customer Service in making it happen.
You have to create the categories yourself and they may or may not 'ask' you if this is a category to flag for taxes.
I wish it was better with dealing with budgetting and with income.
Honestly it’s one of my favorite parts of my job - when I get to create a tool that makes part of someone’s job way easier, I can feel the gratitude and appreciation and it makes my day.
This should be in each geography class.
I wish it was better with dealing with budgetting and with income.
I wish it had a little history with it to round it out.
